/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/sudoku_gui.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sudoku_gui.dir/src/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sudoku_gui.dir/src/Board.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sudoku_gui.dir/src/Solver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sudoku_gui.dir/src/Generator.cpp.o -o sudoku_gui  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-graphics.3.0.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-window.3.0.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-system.3.0.2.dylib
